description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a weathered, grayish-brown finish, suggesting frequent use. The head of the axe is made of metal and painted a worn red, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end. The blade edge is straight and wide, designed for chopping, while the poll is squared off for striking. The handle is smoothly contoured for grip and ergonomics, tapering slightly toward the end. The mounting of the head to the handle appears traditional, with the wood passing through the eye of the axe head and likely wedged for a secure fit. No visible brand markings or decorative engravings are present, giving the axe a utilitarian, workmanlike appearance.
description: A full-sized axe with a curved wooden handle and a red-painted, wedge-shaped metal head. The tool shows signs of wear and is designed for chopping and striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, red-painted blade with a flat poll.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, showing its rounded cross-section and the narrow profile of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the handle's curve and the other face of the red axe head.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the blade's edge, the poll, and the way the handle is mounted through the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic grip and rounded cross-section; weathered finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single, broad wedge-shaped blade with a straight edge and a squared poll; painted red with no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the axe head.
